description: Loop detector fixture corpus derived from AEON issue #14 artifacts

hard_positives.description: Synthetic reasoning streams reproducing hard loop signals

mild_positives.description: Borderline cases that should remain telemetry-only

clean_negatives.description: Clean controls from sources with 0% hard loops

note: All fixture text is synthetic. No raw CoT/reasoning is committed. Fixtures preserve only the repetition patterns and derived metrics.
